title: Light Uruguayan Pork Stir-fry
description: A refreshing post-workout dish featuring tender pork chops and a vibrant mix of vegetables, prepared in a light, vegan-friendly sauce that suits both mild and spicy tastes.

ingredients.name: Red Pepper Flakes (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a slight kick, add 1 teaspoon

instructions: Trim and season the pork chops with salt and pepper. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for about 10 minutes or until cooked through, flipping halfway through.
Meanwhile, in a pan over medium heat, sauté onions and garlic until translucent. Add bell peppers and cook for another minute.
Drain any excess water from the oyster sauce. Pour it into the pan with your vegetables. Stir in lemon juice and red pepper flakes if using.
Add baked pork chops to the pan. Heat through until all ingredients are well combined, reducing heat to low if needed to prevent scorching.
Serve hot as a light lunch or dinner option.
